title: Restore grass fill in drawForegroundTiles correctly

log.context: Restore grass fill in drawForegroundTiles correctly

Done. Here's what was restored and why:

**Change:** Inside `drawForegroundTiles()`, re-added `ctx.fillStyle = grassColor(tx, ty); ctx.fillRect(x, y, TILE, TILE)` immediately before drawing the tree/rock sprite.

**Location in logic:** This fill only runs after the `if (tileCenterY <= wCenterY) continue` guard passes — meaning it only applies to tiles that are visually in front of the warthog. Tiles behind the warthog are skipped entirely (`continue`), so they never get the grass fill and never ...(truncated)
